{{Infobox character
| name = Benson
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Benson Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Benson is a steel skeleton who resides in the blue-lit basement of [[Valinhall]], where he typically lounges on a stone throne. He possesses a skull with eyes that glow with sapphire or blue flames and wears a tattered, wide-brimmed hat. Despite his skeletal appearance, he can express facial movements such as frowning or raising an eyebrow. Benson is a formidable combatant capable of wielding massive, double-bladed battle-axes with ease in one hand. He is also associated with various suits of armor that can come to [[life]] and has a connection to the power known as [[Nye]]. Beyond his physical presence, Benson's [[essence]] provides a form of metallic reinforcement known as "[[Benson's steel]]." This power can be summoned by individuals to increase their physical strength, provide defense against heavy impacts, or enhance their resilience. This [[steel]] flows through the user's veins like an icy river and can be accessed through mental focus. Benson also appears in the visions of those who draw upon this power.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Benson is a skeletal figure characterized by a body covered in metal and eyes that blaze with sapphire flame. He lounges upon a dark throne while wielding a massive double-bladed axe. After [[Simon]] marches back down to confront him, it is revealed that Benson represents the [[steel]] which [[Kai]] has earned. Ultimately, [[Simon]] possesses the ability to call out to Benson for [[steel]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]]'s body is made of or covered in metal.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]] has one eye that blazes blue.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] marches back down to [[Benson]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]] is a skeleton who lounges on a dark throne.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]]'s eyes glow with sapphire flame.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]] wields a huge double-bladed axe.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson]] is someone whose [[steel]] [[Kai]] has earned.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can call out to [[Benson]] for [[steel]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Benson]] once gave [[Kai]] a quicksilver vial.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Benson]] sits on a throne in [[Valinhall]]'s blue-lit basement.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Benson]] is a steel skeleton.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Benson]] has [[steel]] that [[Denner]] tried to obtain.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Benson was once a guardian who served as a potential example of a being transitioning into an artificial [[construct]]. By the time he was encountered in the basement, he had become a steel skeleton composed of shining silvery metal. In this form, he wielded an axe while engaged in combat against [[Erastes]]. Ultimately, his strength was diminished when [[Kai]] took power from him.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]] is mentioned as a potential example of a guardian turning into an artificial [[construct]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]] is a skeleton fighting [[Erastes]] in the basement.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]] is a steel skeleton who wields an axe.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]] is a skeleton made of shining silvery metal.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] had taken power from [[Benson]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
